results.agent_output_excerpt:
10/10 tests pass. Here's a walkthrough of what was built:

---

**`.tmp/reserveSeat.ts`** — Implementation

```
AC4 → findSeat(seatId) → null? → throw SEAT_NOT_FOUND
AC2 → seat.status !== "available"? → throw SEAT_ALREADY_RESERVED
AC1/AC3 → updateSeatStatus(..., expectedCurrentStatus="available")
         → false (optimistic lock lost) → throw SEAT_ALREADY_RESERVED
         → true → return Reservation { seatId, userId, reservedAt }
```
